title: Ad Dammam Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Ad Dammam with a Z-Score of +5.23. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures, with a Score of 10.0/10, classified as CRITICAL.
body:
The current heat wave in Ad Dammam is causing temperatures to soar, with a CDD of 17.3 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 16%, and the wind speed is 9.0 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The city's infrastructure and residents are under immense pressure, with the heat wave expected to continue.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to ensure public safety.
